# Orbit radius & elevation

Orbit is a **mostly flat** system: hierarchy comes from tonal layering and borders,
not shadow. Shadows are reserved for genuinely floating UI (dropdowns, popovers,
tooltips, modals, toasts).

## Border radius

| Token | Value | CSS variable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `none` | 0px | `var(--orbit-radius-none)` |
| `sm` | 4px | `var(--orbit-radius-sm)` |
| `md` | 8px | `var(--orbit-radius-md)` |
| `lg` | 12px | `var(--orbit-radius-lg)` |

> ⚠ **Known gap:** `rounded.full` / `--orbit-radius-pill` is referenced by 6
> components (Avatar, Filter, StepCircle, SideNav, Radio, MultiSelectDropdown) but
> is **not defined** in the token source. Until a `--orbit-radius-pill` token is
> added, those components rely on a CSS fallback. Do not invent a value — treat
> "full/pill" as an undefined token pending a fix.

## Shadows

| Token | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `--orbit-shadow-none` | 0 0 0 0 transparent |
| `--orbit-shadow-sm` | 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) |
| `--orbit-shadow-md` | 0 2px 6px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) |
| `--orbit-shadow-lg` | 0 6px 8px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) |
| `--orbit-shadow-color` | rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) |
| `--orbit-shadow-color-none` | transparent |

## Z-index

| Token | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `--orbit-z-dropdown` | 100 |
| `--orbit-z-sticky` | 10 |
| `--orbit-z-tooltip` | 1000 |
| `--orbit-z-overlay` | 9000 |
| `--orbit-z-toast` | 10000 |

## Focus ring

| Token | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `--orbit-color-focus-ring` | var(--orbit-color-bright-green) |
